entities.name: ICMA-5
entities.description: A cytoplasmic-nuclear male-sterile line of pearl millet with registration number GS-3, PI 597783

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-NUCLEAR MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A form of male sterility involving both cytoplasmic and nuclear genetic components

entities.name: A5 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasm type found in the ICMA-5 line that confers male sterility

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The condition where a plant is unable to produce functional pollen

entities.name: ICRISAT ASIA CENTER
entities.description: The research center in Patancheru, AP, India, that released the ICMA-5 line
